name.zh: 偏航煞車釋放與齒盤潤滑

steps.zh: 確認偏航煞車液壓壓力是否完全洩除
steps.en: Confirm yaw brake hydraulic pressure fully released

steps.zh: 釋放卡滯煞車片並潤滑齒盤
steps.en: Free the stuck brake pads and lubricate the ring gear

steps.zh: 複歸偏航定位並驗證回授
steps.en: Re-home yaw position and verify feedback

steps.zh: 校正三支葉片變槳零位
steps.en: Calibrate the three blades' pitch zero
